CVE-2021-21898.title: A code execution vulnerability exists in the dwgCompressor::decom ...
CVE-2021-21898.description: A code execution vulnerability exists in the dwgCompressor::decompress18() functionality of LibreCad libdxfrw 2.2.0-rc2-19-ge02f3580. A specially-crafted .dwg file can lead to an out-of-bounds write. An attacker can provide a malicious file to trigger this vulnerability.

CVE-2021-21899.title: A code execution vulnerability exists in the dwgCompressor::copyC ...
CVE-2021-21899.description: A code execution vulnerability exists in the dwgCompressor::copyCompBytes21 functionality of LibreCad libdxfrw 2.2.0-rc2-19-ge02f3580. A specially-crafted .dwg file can lead to a heap buffer overflow. An attacker can provide a malicious file to trigger this vulnerability.

CVE-2021-21900.title: A code execution vulnerability exists in the dxfRW::processLType( ...
CVE-2021-21900.description: A code execution vulnerability exists in the dxfRW::processLType() functionality of LibreCad libdxfrw 2.2.0-rc2-19-ge02f3580. A specially-crafted .dxf file can lead to a use-after-free vulnerability. An attacker can provide a malicious file to trigger this vulnerability.

CVE-2021-45341.title: A buffer overflow vulnerability in CDataMoji of the jwwlib compon ...
CVE-2021-45341.description: A buffer overflow vulnerability in CDataMoji of the jwwlib component of LibreCAD 2.2.0-rc3 and older allows an attacker to achieve Remote Code Execution using a crafted JWW document.

CVE-2021-45342.title: A buffer overflow vulnerability in CDataList of the jwwlib compon ...
CVE-2021-45342.description: A buffer overflow vulnerability in CDataList of the jwwlib component of LibreCAD 2.2.0-rc3 and older allows an attacker to achieve Remote Code Execution using a crafted JWW document.

CVE-2021-45343.title: In LibreCAD 2.2.0, a NULL pointer dereference in the HATCH handli ...
CVE-2021-45343.description: In LibreCAD 2.2.0, a NULL pointer dereference in the HATCH handling of libdxfrw allows an attacker to crash the application using a crafted DXF document.

CVE-2023-30259.title: A Buffer Overflow vulnerability in importshp plugin in LibreCAD 2 ...
CVE-2023-30259.description: A Buffer Overflow vulnerability in importshp plugin in LibreCAD 2.2.0 allows attackers to obtain sensitive information via a crafted DBF file.
